name: Sun Blade
description: This item appears to be a sword hilt.

blade_of_radiance.activation: Bonus Action to summon or dismiss blade
blade_of_radiance.proficiency: Proficient if proficient with Longswords or Shortswords

sunlight.effect: Luminous blade emits Bright Light in 15-foot radius
sunlight.adjustment: Magic action to expand or reduce radius by 5 feet each
